summary: The diff implements REQ-26 (PhonePe deep link), REQ-27 (real-time total calculation), and REQ-28 (delivery date display). However, REQ-29 (SMS notifications) is only partially implemented with a placeholder SMS gateway URL, lacking proper configuration and error handling as specified in acceptance criteria.

missing_requirements.requirement: SMS sending does not block the order submission flow
missing_requirements.reason: The backend sendOrderConfirmationSms function is called with 'await' in placeOrder, which blocks the order submission flow until SMS completes. AC requires non-blocking behavior.
The sendOrderConfirmationSms function has no try-catch or error handling mechanism. If the HTTP call fails, it will propagate the error up and potentially fail the order placement.

missing_requirements.requirement: SMS is sent to the customer's phone number after order placement with proper configuration
missing_requirements.reason: The SMS gateway URL is a placeholder ('https://api.smsprovider.com/send') with no real provider configured, and the message encoding is incomplete (just assigns message to encodedMessage without actual URL encoding).

hallucinated_features.description: Added migration.mo file with Order schema migration logic including phoneNumber field migration
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not mention any schema migration or data migration requirements. The migration module was added without being requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Toast notifications for PhonePe app opening success/failure
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-26 requires graceful fallback if PhonePe app is not installed, but does not specify toast notifications. The diff mentions 'toast notifications' in the OrderForm.tsx summary.
